apiInfo.title: Policy Transactions API - Update Systematic Withdrawal & Update Systematic RMD
apiInfo.description: API to update a systematic withdrawal and Systematic RMD on a policy.

fieldInstances.description: Unique policy number (1–30 characters).
Identifier returned in the Location header from the POST.
Technical message with specific error details for developers identify the type of error quickly.
Server-assigned identifier for the withdrawal request.
Current status of the withdrawal request.

- <domain>: The logical domain (e.g., "gateway")
- <category>: The error category (e.g., "client" or "server")
- <subcategory>: A specific error identifier (e.g., "badrequest", "timeout")
